posts.text: Texas has a new DMV rule that demands proof of legal status for vehicle titles and first-time registration. This is not public safety. No data shows undocumented immigrants cause more accidents than U.S. citizens. They are just playing with people’s livelihoods. #texas #dmv #undocumeted #immigrants #latino

posts.text: ICE agents took the life of 23-year-old Ruben Ray Martinez in South Padre Island, Texas last year. For nearly a year, it was concealed. According to Martinez’s mother, anyone who knew her son, “knows he was NOT a violent person, never a threat to anyone.” This was during spring break. In a social media posts, she asked, “How is a car a threat at zero mph?” #rubenraymartinez #latino #reneegood #alexpretti #breakingnews
